\[
\sum_x \frac{p(x)}{1+\kappa-\kappa p(x)}=1,\qquad\pi(x)=\frac{p(x)}{1+\kappa-\kappa p(x)},\qquad w(x)\propto \frac{p(x)}{(1+\kappa-\kappa p(x))^{2}}.
\]
\[
\det(I-zK^\star_\delta)=\widetilde{\mathcal P}_\delta(\kappa z)+z\,\widetilde{\mathcal P}_\delta'(\kappa z),\qquad\widetilde{\mathcal P}_\delta(z)=\prod_x\left(1-\frac{p(x)}{1+\kappa}z\right).
\]
\[
\text{Example: }\delta=0.02,\ \kappa\approx 183.8295436804350044715959,\ \max|w-w_{\rm rec}|\approx 1.899122509e-45,\ \max|K-K_{\rm rec}|\approx 9.485154929e-47.
\]
